channel.title: Fire-Ice on Dyson Sphere Program Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Fire-Ice on Dyson Sphere Program Guide

item.title: Dyson Sphere Program Mining Outposts: Coal, Fire Ice & Resource Veins
item.description:
Every DSP factory runs on raw materials — and raw materials live on planets that are rarely the planet where your main factory sits. Mining outposts are how you get coal from a gas giant's moon, titanium from an ice world, and fire ice from the dark reaches of the galaxy without leaving your main factory's logistics grid.

This guide covers how to build mining outposts, position mining machines correctly, and connect them to your logistics network so resources flow automatically.

item.title: DSP Fire Ice & Deuterium: Cold Planet Refining Guide
item.description:
You've found a lava world or an ice giant. The stars call it a Fire Ice planet — and it's full of something that doesn't exist on temperate worlds: Deuterium. Deuterium is your path to advanced fuels, high-output Rocket Fuel, and the Yellow Science chain.

But getting it out of the ground and into your factory requires understanding a completely different logistics problem.

This guide covers finding Fire Ice planets, the extraction and refining mechanics, managing the water byproduct, and how to integrate Deuterium into your endgame production.
